title: Synchronous ready/valid FIFO
description: Generate a small synchronous FIFO with ready/valid push and pop sides, explicit full and empty flags, and conservative synthesizable SystemVerilog.

constraints.latency: first pushed value becomes visible on dout when FIFO is non-empty
constraints.synthesis_subset: conservative SystemVerilog accepted by Verilator and Yosys

acceptance_checks.description: Structured spec has no open questions.
cocotb directed and randomized tests pass.
Final report records artifacts, commands, evidence, and risks.

done_when: reports/final.md summarizes artifacts, fixes, and risks
